name: awesome-kit
description: Christina's cross-domain skills: a shared communication framework (hand-off + verbose-updates), /plugin-ecosystem (interactive 16:9 HTML poster of marketplaces and plugins), and /html-pdf (convert an HTML file to PDF via headless Chromium and open it). Depends on plugins-kit:skills-kit for the shared audit framework, knowledge-encoding, and update-documentation. /claude-explorer moved to plugins-kit:prototypes in 0.5.0; update-documentation moved to plugins-kit:skills-kit.
